overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a survival horror video game. The player character walks slowly through a dark forest at night holding a wooden bat, moving along a dirt path toward a distant orange light source. The environment features dense trees and undergrowth with limited visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail beside large tree trunk

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along the forest path holding a wooden bat in the left hand, staying close to a large tree trunk on the left side

entered.detail: thick tree trunk with rough bark texture immediately beside the path
wooden melee weapon held in the left hand of the character
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest with scattered leaves
tall grass and small plants lining both sides of the path
faint orange glow visible through the trees in the distance suggesting a campfire or light source

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view of a character holding a wooden bat while walking alongside a large tree trunk in a dark forest at night. The path is narrow and surrounded by dense grass and vegetation, with a mysterious orange light visible far ahead through the trees.

events.description: character lowers weapon out of frame, continuing unarmed

agents.ego_description: continuing down the forest path with weapon lowered, moving deeper into the woods toward the distant light

entered.detail: dense cluster of trees visible on the right side as the path opens up

segments.scene_description: As the character moves past the large tree, the weapon is lowered out of view and the scene opens into a denser section of forest. The path continues forward surrounded by thick vegetation on both sides, with the distant orange light still visible ahead through the darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dark, oppressive forest toward a distant, mysterious light source. It begins with the character clutching a wooden bat while navigating a narrow dirt path beside a massive tree trunk, surrounded by dense grass and thick vegetation. As the camera moves past the tree, the weapon is lowered out of view and the environment shifts into an even denser section of the woods. The scene then pushes forward through the encroaching undergrowth, maintaining a steady trajectory toward the orange glow that flickers through the darkness ahead.
